title: synaedrys platycarpa
side_effects: Synaedrys platycarpa can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain due to the high levels of alkaloids present in the plant. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe symptoms, including respiratory problems, headaches, and even temporary liver damage. In rare cases, improper use of Synaedrys platycarpa has been linked to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
